changes: withdraw approve/reject is idempotent: repeating the same completed action returns success and refreshes the admin card
stale processing locks recover automatically after 90 seconds without double settlement
admin finance list reloads after success or error so pending status cannot remain visually stale
processing, approved, rejected, and pending statuses are displayed clearly in Arabic
withdrawal cards use a single-column responsive layout and readable wallet addresses on narrow screens
keeps V224 complete withdrawal destination details and all prior fixes
